title: The World Machine UI
description: A recreation of the Oneshot World Machine Edition UI; in Minecraft! Versions available in 1.21, 1.20.1, b1.7.3 and Better than Adventure!
body:
A fun little resourcepack that tries to recreate the UI from Oneshot WME in Minecraft form.
For versions:
1.21,
1.20.1,
b1.7.3,
Better than Adventure! 7.3_03,
and their respective updates.


Has compatibility for Xaero's Minimap, Jade and BackSlot.
